display.purpose: Major view titles and mod detail titles only.

body.purpose: Descriptions, help copy, and normal UI prose.

label.purpose: Buttons, navigation, table headers, tags, and compact labels.

shadows.name: soft-overlay
shadows.purpose: Generic raised overlay shadow from the Tailwind token.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Button, text, and background state transitions.

motion.name: stage-fade
motion.purpose: View stage opacity transitions and tab panel fades.

motion.name: loading-spin
motion.purpose: Small inline loading indicators inside buttons.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Commit actions such as Save Collection and Save Changes.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 44px; padding: 0 14px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; color: var(--app-color-text-base); font-family: var(--app-font-body); font-weight: 650; background: var(--app-color-primary); border: 1px solid var(--app-color-primary); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 120ms ease, border-color 120ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--app-color-primary-hover); border-color: var(--app-color-primary-hover); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--app-color-background), 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in srgb, var(--app-color-text-base) 78%, var(--app-color-primary) 22%); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.55; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 44px; padding: 0 14px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; color: var(--app-color-text); font-family: var(--app-font-body); font-weight: 650; background: var(--app-color-surface-elevated); border: 1px solid var(--app-color-border); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 120ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--app-color-text-base) 4%, transparent); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--app-color-background), 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in srgb, var(--app-color-text-base) 78%, var(--app-color-primary) 22%); } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { opacity: 0.55; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Search, path, Workshop ID, and settings text fields.
components.css: .ds-input { box-sizing: border-box; min-height: 44px; width: 280px; min-width: 0; padding: 0 11px; color: var(--app-color-text); font-family: var(--app-font-body); background: var(--app-color-surface-elevated); border: 1px solid var(--app-color-border); border-radius: 8px; outline: none; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: var(--app-color-primary); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--app-color-background), 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in srgb, var(--app-color-text-base) 78%, var(--app-color-primary) 22%); } .ds-input:disabled { color: var(--app-color-text-muted); background: var(--app-color-surface); cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Status Tag
components.description: Compact row metadata and dependency status labels.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; max-width: 100%; min-height: 22px; padding: 0 7px; color: var(--app-color-tag-default-text); font-family: var(--app-font-body); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 650; line-height: 20px; background: var(--app-color-surface-elevated); border: 1px solid var(--app-color-border); border-radius: 4px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }

components.name: Side Navigation Button
components.description: Primary app route navigation in the persistent side rail.
components.css: .ds-nav-button { min-height: 52px; width: 100%; padding: 0 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; color: var(--app-color-text-muted); background: transparent; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-button:hover, .ds-nav-button[aria-current="page"] { color: var(--app-color-text); background: var(--app-color-surface-elevated); } .ds-nav-button:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--app-color-background), 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in srgb, var(--app-color-text-base) 78%, var(--app-color-primary) 22%); } .ds-nav-icon { width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 4px; background: currentColor; opacity: 0.72; } .ds-nav-label { font-family: var(--app-font-display); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0; text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Table Row
components.description: Dense virtualized table row for mods and block lookup data.
components.html:
Better Future Blocks
Dependency OK
components.css: .ds-table-row { display: flex; min-height: 48px; color: var(--app-color-text); background: var(--app-color-surface); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--app-color-border); font-family: var(--app-font-body); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-table-row:hover { background: var(--app-color-surface-alt); } .ds-table-row[aria-selected="true"] { background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--app-color-primary) 14%, transparent); } .ds-table-cell { min-width: 0; flex: 1 1 0; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 8px; overflow: hidden; }

components.name: Dialog
components.description: Scoped edit or confirmation surface over the workbench.
components.html: Edit Logger ID
components.css: .ds-dialog { width: min(560px, 100%); max-height: min(680px, calc(100vh - 48px)); display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; color: var(--app-color-text); background: var(--app-color-surface-elevated); border: 1px solid var(--app-color-border); border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 16px 36px color-mix(in srgb, var(--app-color-background) 72%, transparent); font-family: var(--app-font-body); } .ds-dialog-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 10px; padding: 14px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--app-color-border); } .ds-dialog-header h2 { margin: 0; color: var(--app-color-text); font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-dialog-body { padding: 16px; overflow: auto; }

narrative.overview:
TTSMM-EX should feel like a practical workbench beside a PC game install: compact, sturdy, and immediately ready for correction work. The current interface is a dark desktop utility with warm off-white text, muted charcoal surfaces, and a rust primary that marks action and selection without turning the app into a promotional surface.

The user is managing Steam Workshop mods, validation, game paths, dependencies, and launch flow. The design must stay dense enough for repeated use, with obvious hierarchy for first-time recovery. It rejects anything that feels like browsing, promotion, discovery, a storefront, or a social feed.
keyCharacteristics: Compact desktop density with 44px controls and table-first work areas.
Warm charcoal neutrals, never pure black or pure white.
Rust primary used for commit actions, selection, focus, and links.
Status colors are muted and operational, not decorative.
Familiar controls win: buttons, fields, tables, tabs, switches, dialogs, and side navigation.

rules.name: The Rust Is a Verb Rule
rules.body: Use the primary only when something is selected, focused, actionable, or committed. It is not decoration.

rules.name: The Charcoal Ladder Rule
rules.body: Depth comes from adjacent neutral layers, not large color jumps. Move from `background` to `surface` to `surface-elevated` before adding shadow.

rules.name: The Native Utility Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce display fonts, expressive typefaces, negative letter spacing, or fluid type. This is a desktop tool, not a campaign.

rules.name: The Flat Until Floating Rule
rules.body: Tables, cards, panels, rows, and settings groups stay flat. Only menus and dialogs cast shadows.

dos: Do preserve the desktop utility posture: dense, disciplined, and low-noise.
Do use 44px as the standard control height and keep compact table rows at 36px to 48px.
Do rely on 1px borders, sticky headers, and tonal layers before adding shadows.
Do reserve Workshop Rust for action, focus, selection, links, and active state.
Do keep status feedback visible around validation, save, dependency, and launch flows.
Do use familiar desktop patterns: side navigation, tables, tabs, forms, switches, and inline toolbar actions.
donts: Don't mimic a Workshop browser, feed, storefront, promotional landing page, social media product, or content-discovery surface.
Don't use pure black or pure white; keep neutrals warm and tinted.
Don't add gradient text, glassmorphism, decorative motion, hero metrics, or repeated identical card grids.
Don't use colored side-stripe borders on cards, list items, callouts, or alerts.
Don't introduce display fonts, oversized hero type, or marketing-style spacing.
Don't make inactive states full-saturation or visually louder than the user's current task.
